resources.string: Mythic Tools is 🛠️ by a very small 👥, but with lots of ❤️, in 🇫🇷 and 🇺🇸.
You can reach us in different ways:
Add friends. Create playgroups. List your decks. Save full game history. All with cross-device sync and statistics!
Unlock the full power of Mythic Tools. 100% Free.

"This deck is currently duplicated for you to use but the card list is managed by @{1}. If you enable changes, it will create an independent copy - just for you - that you will be able to modify.
This creates independent stats for the decks from that point onward."
Unable to add cards to list
Your scanned cards have been successfully saved.
Some matches are ending in a draw. Are you ready to submit scores?
The current game progress will be lost.
Assign commander damage dealt to you.
The automatic bracket calculation is missing or outdated. Click here to recalculate.
"Auto-import cards daily. This will override changes made in Mythic Tools."
The average mana value is %1$s with lands and %2$s without lands. The median value is %3$s with lands and %4$s without. Total mana value: %5$s.
Add a new copy to my collection
"Managing 'Collection Status' allows you to know precisely when - and where - a card that you own is currently being used in a deck."

"You can apply bulk actions to all cards whose Collection Status is not yet defined. Examples include: • Adding all cards from the deck to your collection at once (i.e. this is an existing deck you own) • Grab exact or partial matches from your collection for the cards that you happen to own."
Device is plugged in, restoring effects.
The battery level of your device has dropped below 10%. We can disable animations and lower refresh rates in order to save power.
The battery level of your device has dropped below 25%. We can disable some animations and lower refresh rates in order to save power.
The battery level of your device has dropped below 50%. We can disable some animations and lower refresh rates in order to save power.
"Tap on the score box to see options such as 'concede', 'draw' and more."
Decks to prioritize a goal, theme, or idea over power
Rules around card legality or viable commanders to have some flexibility depending on the pod
Win conditions to be highly thematic or substandard
Gameplay to be an opportunity to show off your creations

"Generally, you should expect to be able to play at least nine turns before you win or lose. Most importantly, given this bracket's emphasis on theme, players should feel like they have the time to showcase their decks."
Decks to be unoptimized and straightforward, with some cards chosen to maximize creativity and/or entertainment
Win conditions to be incremental, telegraphed on the board, and disruptable
Gameplay to be low pressure with an emphasis on social interaction
Gameplay to be proactive and considerate, letting each deck showcase its plan
Generally, you should expect to be able to play at least eight turns before you win or lose.
Decks to be powered up with strong synergy and high card quality; they can effectively disrupt opponents
Game Changers that are likely to be value engines and game-ending spells
Win conditions that can be deployed in one big turn from hand, usually because of steadily accrued resources
Gameplay to feature many proactive and reactive plays
Generally, you should expect to be able to play at least six turns before you win or lose.
Decks not to adhere to the cEDH metagame reserved for Bracket 5
Decks to be lethal, consistent, and fast, designed to take people down as fast as possible
Game Changers that are likely to be fast mana, snowballing resource engines, free disruption, and tutors
Win conditions to vary but be efficient and instantaneous
Gameplay to be explosive and powerful, featuring huge threats and efficient disruption to match
Generally, you should expect to be able to play at least four turns before you win or lose.

Decks that are meticulously designed to battle in the cEDH metagame, with the ability to win quickly or generate overwhelming resources; often built using existing cEDH knowledge, tools, and/or decklists
Win conditions to be optimized for efficiency and consistency
Gameplay to be intricate and advanced, with razor-thin margins for error; players prioritize victory over all else
These games could end on any turn.
Using the Camera is required to add a new Friend.
Camera permission is required to scan QR codes. Please enable it in the app settings.
Using the Camera is required to scan a Mythic QR.
"Mythic Tools needs the camera permission to scan your friend's Mythic QR."
Mythic Tools needs the camera permission to scan a promo code.
No camera could be found on this device. The scanning feature requires a camera to work.
Cannot convert a list with 1000+ cards into a deck
You can only leave this playgroup if you promote another user as Admin first.
Link invalid. Could not be opened.
Card not found with overrides, retrying with scanned values…
This card is only available in foil
This card is only available in non-foil
High power, with a very competitive and metagame focus.
Please check your inbox and click on the verification link to continue…
Please select a commander bracket for your deck:
Display on the Left or Right?
"Track your entire collection with ease. Scan whole boxes and binders in a flash. All 100% free with a Mythic Tools account."

"The 'Collection' tab allows to create virtual boxes and binders for the cards that you physically own. You can mirror your existing boxes and binders to help locate physical cards easily - and unsorted cards can go into the 'Bulk' item."
"You don't own any version of this card"
Add a new copy to my Collection
This is a new card you need to bring in.
Apply actions based on your collection
Choose this for actions based on existing matches in your collection.
Apply the same action to all cards
Choose this for adding all cards as new copies to your collection, for example.
Detailed Collection Tracking for basic lands is not available by default. You can enable it using the Settings (gear icon) in the toolbar of this page.
"Manage the 'Collection Status' for this card by choosing one of the options below."
There is at least one exact match in your collection.
There are %d matches in your collection.
There is 1 match in your collection.
There is 1 exact match in your collection.
There are %d partial matches in your collection.
There is 1 partial match in your collection.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Do not display all print variants in search
This will remove the card from the list entirely.
This will remove the card(s) from this list entirely.
"If you proceed {1} will be dropped, starting with the next round and from the rest of the tournament. This can't be undone."
"Do you want to rollback to this point? This can't be undone."
This will drop the current scanned cards list and start over.
Please consider a one-time purchase - less than a single booster pack - to fuel further development of Mythic Tools
The following cards could not be imported:
Run your own Constructed or Limited event
Pick a Deck, add guests, save the game
Adjust how CSV columns map to card fields
"We couldn't detect all required fields. Please map them below."
Your primary language appears to be {1}. In order to enable card scan & search for {1} we need to download an additional database file (approx. 25 MB)
We have detected {1} text on the card that you are trying to scan. In order to enable card scan & search for {1} we need to download an additional database file (approx. 25 MB)
We need to download a database update for {1}.
A Draft or Sealed deck must contain at least 40 cards. It is usually best to shoot for exactly 40.
It is generally recommended to prioritize spells with a lower mana value.
Cannot change the format. This deck has saved games already.
Ignore Card Variants for Basic Lands
This will add to existing cards in the deck.
This will replace all existing cards in the deck.
This deck is private or does not exist.
Deck list sharing from Friends is coming soon. Stay tuned.

"The 'Decks' tab shows all your non-archived decks. For each deck, you'll be able to manage the collection status of cards by either adding them to your collection, fetching prints from your existing boxes or marking them as proxies."
Could not open this link. Please try again.
Please sign in to open this link.
Start your {{ sub_offer_duration }} trial, then {{ total_price_and_per_month }}.
"Are you sure you want to delete the circle \"%1$s\"? This can't be undone."
Are you sure you want to archive this deck?

"
WARNING: This deck is your free 'Smart Deck' - we advise you to keep it and just edit it to start anew."
Are you sure you want to delete this game? This cannot be undone. If you wish to proceed please type \"delete\" below and confirm.
Do you want to fully delete this note? Deleting a note cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete this playgroup? This cannot be undone. If you wish to proceed please type \"delete\" below and confirm.
Are you sure you want to delete this match? This cannot be undone and will delete all its associated games. If you wish to proceed please type \"delete\" below and confirm.
Deleting a Tournament is final, and will erase the current standings.
This will remove {1} cards from this list and cannot be undone. To proceed please type delete below.
Monte Carlo simulation of %1$d random opening hands, filtering for %2$d+ lands in hand (%3$d valid hands kept). Takes into account %4$d land(s) and %5$d ramp card(s).
Search for %s cards that fit your deck

Mythic Tools is an unofficial app / fan content, made for the MTG community by MTG players and is not approved/endorsed by Wizards. Portions of the materials used are property of Wizards of the Coast. ©Wizards of the Coast LLC.
You can access our Privacy Policy at https://studiomythic.com/privacy-policy
In order to enable card search for {1} we need to download an additional database file (approx. 25 MB)
We were not able to download the file at the moment. Please try again later.
In order to translate rulings for {1} we need to download an additional database file (approx. 20 MB)
Drag the leader badge onto the correct player
Drag to assign to a Player
Failed to duplicate deck. Please try again.

"Duplicating the deck allows you to borrow it for games while still letting @{1} own and manage the card list.
You can 'Activate changes' later from the deck page to create a fully independent copy that'll be just yours."
Click here to opt-in for occasional tips & tricks
"This will remove all the cards from the list and can't be undone."
Prompt when battery goes below 50, 25 and 10%
Play a short beep when a card is detected
Enjoy unlimited scans permanently with a single one-time purchase.
Please leave us a review by tapping here.
"Please leave us a review by tapping here."
The note could not be deleted.
{count} card(s) are not legal in {format} format
{count} card(s) appear multiple times (excluding Basic Lands)
{count} card(s) exceed the maximum number of copies allowed
{count} card(s) have invalid rarity for {format} format
You do not appear to have access to this list
Deck has {count} commanders, but must have exactly {required}
We are unable to access the Mythic+ offer at the moment
Deck has {total} cards, but must have exactly {required}
Deck has {total} cards, but must have at least {min}
Deck has {total} cards, but must have exactly {required}
Deck has {total} cards, but cannot have more than {max}
"{count} card(s) don't match commander's color identity"
Scoring calibrated for a casual deck (power %d)
Scoring calibrated for a high-power deck (power %d)
"How the scoring is weighted for your deck. The mix adapts to your deck's calibrated power level."
cards at this cost in the deck
Every card in your deck, grouped by category. Use the other pills to focus on a single group.
Cards aligned with a deck theme, filling a needed role, or frequently played alongside the rest of your deck.
Cards with the weakest signal overlap — often personal picks, budget choices, or in-progress additions.
"Format staples the scoring won't suggest as cuts."
Cards with moderate signal across the board.
Commonly played alongside the other cards in your deck
Rarely played alongside the other cards in your deck
Sometimes seen in decks with a similar card pool
Played in %1$s%% of Commander decks globally (%2$s)
Played in %d%% of Commander decks in our database.
Part of a detected combo in your deck — cutting it breaks the line.
Extra-turn effect — often the engine of a win condition, not a filler slot.
Fast-mana piece — almost always deck-shaping, regardless of archetype.
Listed as a game-changer in your bracket — the scoring keeps it out of the cut-candidate band.
Mass land-denial effect — treated as deck-shaping infrastructure.
Widely adopted by decks led by this commander — usually a deliberate archetype pick.
Played in a very large share of Commander decks — treated as deck-agnostic infrastructure.
Unconditional tutor — pulls weight in any archetype.
How well your deck covers each role
Part of a detected combo in your deck.
Extra-turn effect — often the engine of a win condition.
Fast-mana piece — deck-shaping regardless of archetype.
Fills a structural role your deck is light on.
Listed as a game-changer in your bracket.
Frequently seen alongside the rest of your deck in similar lists.
Strongly aligned with a theme detected in your deck.
Rarely seen alongside the rest of your deck in similar lists.
Weakly aligned with the themes detected in your deck.
Matches one of the themes detected in your deck.
Widely adopted by decks led by this commander.
Your deck already has plenty of cards in this role.
Played in a very large share of Commander decks.
Unconditional tutor — pulls weight in any archetype.
Frequently played alongside the other cards in your deck.
Fills a structural role your deck needs (ramp, removal, draw, etc.).
Aligned with one of the themes detected in your deck.
The game ended in a draw
has been selected to go first
has been selected in a toss
Unable to export collection at this time.
Unable to export your deck at this time.
Unable to export your list at this time.
Failed to prepare file for sharing
Create from your most common settings
Filter by set name or code
"This will create a single-elimination follow-up 'finals' tournament from the current standings."
This device does not have a fingerprint sensor
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
The current match has a score of {1} - {2} with {3} finished game(s). If you end it now, it will be synced to your account as is. Is that correct?
Failed to activate changes. Please try again.
Invite a friend by typing their Mythic code below:
"Your friend hasn't accepted the invite just yet."
Deleting a deck is final and cannot be undone. If you wish to proceed please type delete below and confirm.
"This will delete the list entirely and can't be undone. To proceeed please type in the word 'delete' below."

"Game Changers are specific cards identified by Wizards of the Coast as having a high impact on a Commander game's power level. Under the new Bracket System, these cards act as tier-definers. Including them in your deck can automatically shift it into a higher power bracket. This tag helps you identify which cards might be pushing your deck into a more competitive weight class."
This game appears to be over. Are you done with it?
There is a game in progress. Resume it now?
There is already a game in progress. You need to complete or delete it first.
"You have a game in progress. You should complete it before logging out. You can also discard it, but it won't be saved to your account."
"Some players haven't chosen a deck yet. Do you wish to delete the game?"
Current score is {1} - {2}, with {3} game(s) played. Ready to move to the next game?
All players with an account need to chose a seat and select a deck. Do you wish to delete the game instead?

"If this game is over, we can sync it to your Mythic Tools account.
You can also discard this game now, but it won't be synced to your account."
This game lasted less than a minute and has very few game events. Are you sure you want to save it to your account?
This game appears to be very short
"The current game doesn't have a winner yet. In order to sync it to your MT account, you should finish it first. You can also discard this game now, but it won't be synced to your account."
Players have not been seated yet. Do you wish to delete the game?
Should we save this game data to your Mythic Tools account now?
Your game has been successfully synced to your Mythic Tools account.
This user is currently not sharing their games with you.
No PIN, pattern, or password set.
This device does not support PIN, pattern, or password.

"This score is an average of your deck's competitive edge, manabase efficiency and structural health.
Pairing decks with large score differences can lead to unbalanced games."
Illustrations and animations by Zishan Liu, Camille Couturier and Norbert Norkenster
Import your Magic: The Gathering card collection from a CSV file.
Paste your card list below. Supports formats like: 1x Card Name (SET) 123 *F*
Ready to import %1$d card(s) into %2$d container(s).
Import a deck list from text input or file
Some errors were detected while parsing the CSV file. Would you like to continue with the import?
You do not seem connected to the Internet. Please try again later.
Drag your player token to the next room
This code does not seem associated with any Mythic Tool user
Invalid URL. Please enter a valid URL from a supported domain.
Failed to send invitation. Please try again.
Do you want to invite {1} (@{2}) to be friends?
{1} has been invited to your Friends list. Now they need to accept the invite.
"Are you sure you want to leave the playgroup? This can't be undone and you'll have to get invited again later."
Barcode scanning library for Android, using ZXing for decoding.
"The 'Lists' tab is for lists of cards that you want to track but don't own. You can use them to prepare for trades, for wish lists and more."
"After a few scans, Mythic Tools' card scanning is limited to one card per day."
Invalid email address or password. Please try again.
Date does not match expected pattern: %1$s
Date out of expected year range %1$s - %2$s
Swipe to select a year, or tap to switch back to selecting a day
Scroll to show the next month
Scroll to show the previous month
Switch to text input mode for the time input
Switch to clock mode for the time input
Sample mana curve for a 40-card deck
This match appears to be over. Are you done with it?
"The current match doesn't have a winner yet. In order to sync it to your MT account, you should finish it first. You can also discard it now, but it won't be synced to your account."
Switch to clock mode for the time input.
Switch to text input mode for the time input.
Only 8 players at most can be selected for a game.
We are having issues syncing from Moxfield at the moment, and are actively working on a fix.
A Mythic Tools account is 100% free, forever.
Start date selection: %1$s – End date selection: %2$s
Convert this deck for free to unlock powerful suggestions tailored to your deck!
Upgrade now to get powerful suggestions tailored to your deck!
"The '%s' feature is only available with Smart Decks."

"Subscribing to Mythic+ will unlock the smart deck features on all your current and future Commander decks.
When your subscription ends, you will keep all your new and existing decks — they will simply revert to normal decks, without the advanced analysis and the card recommendations."
Your Mythic+ subscription is not currently active.
Could not sync your subscription. Please try again later.
Thank you for subscribing. You can go create or edit your Commander Decks right away and enjoy all the smart deck features. Happy deck building!
Search for cards to add to your deck
Search by name or Scryfall syntax
No apps available to share the file
No browser installed. Link could not be opened.
No cards found in CSV file
This user has not shared any boxes or binders yet.
No combos found for this deck yet
"You don't have any constructed decks yet."
Create decks to fully record the games in your playgroups and get statistics.

"No decks found.
Create one using the app and refresh."
You do not have any decks
No decks found for this filter
No decks found for this user
No Face Card selected. The image of the last added card will be used as a cover image instead.
"Oh No! You don't have any friends yet. We still love you though."
This player has not accepted the playgroup invite yet
This user has not created or shared any lists yet.
This user has no medals yet!
No messages in this playgroup yet.
This card only has one finish available.
"You don't belong to any Playgroup yet. Maybe you play blue?"
"You don't belong to any playgroup yet. Create one and invite your friends, or get invited!"
You need to be member of a playgroup with at least one other player.
WARNING : This will remove cards from your Collection if they were in it previously.
No additional rulings for this card.
No valid cards found in the input
Mythic Tools needs the notification permission to send you friend and playgroup requests.
You appear to be offline. Adding card with cached data for now.
View opening hand land distribution analysis.

"Do you want to receive occasional emails from Mythic Tools with new features, tips and tricks?
You can unsubscribe at any time from the app settings."
You can specify a bracket manually
"Assign the damage from your own commander (ouch, sorry!)"
You have entered one or more invalid scores for this round.
Draws are not allowed in Single-Elimination tournaments
"Player '{1}' will be deleted. This can't be undone."
A player with this name is already entered.
Point your camera at a card
No one can see your list except you.
No one can see your %1$s except you.
You choose who can see your list among your friends and/or playgroups.
You choose who can see your %1$s among your friends and playgroups.
Anyone with a link to your list can view it. This includes all your friends and playgroups.
Anyone with a link to your %1$s can view it.
This QR is invalid, has expired, or has already been used.
You should only promote trusted friends, as they will be able to invite friends to the group, remove friends from the group, as well as edit the playgroup information.
It looks like the purchase has been cancelled. Please try again later.
Your purchase could not be completed at this time. Please try again later.
Unable to purchase at this time. Please try again later.
%1$d of %2$d cards are tracked in competitive play data (%3$d%%)
Average individual card strength based on competitive play data.
"Scan your friend's Mythic QR code to add them:"
An unknown error has occurred. Please try again later.

Cheap ramp (MV 0–2) counts at full value. Mid-cost (MV 3) counts as ×0.7, expensive (MV 4–5) as ×0.4, rituals as ×0.5, and artifact cost reducers (e.g. Medallions) as ×0.7 — reflecting their reduced impact.
Show us some love on the Play Store!
YOU ARE NOW READY TO CREATE A BRAND NEW GAME
This will remove administrator rights from {1}.
"Are you sure you want to remove {username} from your friends? This can't be undone and you'll have to add them back later if you change your mind."
"Are you sure you want to remove {1} from the playgroup? This can't be undone and you'll have to invite them again later."

"The Reserved List is a collection of cards from Magic: The Gathering's early history that Wizards of the Coast has promised never to reprint in a functionally identical form. This policy was created to preserve the collectibility and secondary market value of these cards. As a result, cards with this tag are often rare, expensive, and highly sought after by collectors and players of eternal formats."
Unable to send a reset password email.
A reset password email has been sent.
The current game will be reset.
The current match will be reset to 0 – 0.
"The current game will be reset. Current progress won't be saved."
"The current match will be reset to 0 – 0. Current progress won't be saved."
create a quick game - same as last:
These rules are effective as of %1$s.
Same setup, switch decks if needed
Remember last used sort and group settings for deck lists
Remember last used sort and group settings for collection
"A free Mythic Tools account is required to persist your collection or create saved lists. You can create one from the 'Home' tab"
"Scan a user's Mythic QR to invite them into the game"
Tap on the top half to open oracle text, rulings, etc.
Tap on the bottom half to adjust the print, the language, etc.
"The scanner couldn't start due to memory constraints. Try closing other apps and restarting Mythic Tools."
You can only select cards from the same list
An unknown upload error has occurred. Please try again when you are online.
An unknown upload error has occurred. Your game will be synced in the background later.
Your session has expired. Please sign in again to continue.

"Sharing your collection gives full access to the other user(s).
Shared collections are intended for people you fully trust (e.g. same household). Only share with someone you are comfortable giving complete control over your collection."
Allow others to see your friend code on your profile.
Allow others to see your games.
Allow others to see games played with this deck.
Allow others to see your statistics.
"Allow others to see this deck's statistics."
Add more players to see their shared decks
Showing results from your Collection only
The following Sign-in methods are currently supported:
Sign up and get access to

"Get powerful insights for your favorite deck.
You can convert ONE 'Smart Deck' for free — for life — choose wisely!"
Make this your FREE Smart Deck?
This is a one-time choice and cannot be undone.
You already have a free Smart Deck. Subscribe to Mythic+ now for *unlimited* Smart Decks.
Subscribe to unlock unlimited Smart Decks
This deck is now a Smart Deck!
FIND SIMILAR & OFTEN PLAYED TOGETHER CARDS
This user is currently not sharing their stats with you.

"When 'Live Stream' is on, Mythic Tools will stream all the game data, live, to a dedicated mythic.tools URL.
This allows you, for example, to add an URL source in streaming software such as OBS for live reporting.
Log-into your account at https://mythic.tools/ and go to your 'Profile' to access and copy your dedicated streaming URL."
This is your life quadrant. Each player gets one.
You can tap the upper portion of the quadrant to increase life.
Or tap the lower portion to decrease life.
"Over here you'll assign commander damage dealt to you by other players."
It gets automatically subtracted from your life total.
You can also swipe to edit player names, choose a playmat and more.
Supported formats: Dragon Shield, ManaBox, Moxfield, Archidekt, Delver Lens, DeckBox, Card Binder, Decked, TopDecked, Mythic Tools and more!
Tap to select a guest Deck (optional)
Tap to select a CSV file
Tap to start your first turn
Tap on a score to view details
This deck was created for you as a temporary deck. Do you want to keep it?
Is your mana production balanced with your costs?
Too many lands producing only colorless mana?
Can you cast your commander on curve?
Do your fetch lands have enough targets?
Do you have enough lands for your mana curve?
Are any cards too color-demanding for your mana base?
Do you have enough ramp for your game plan?
How many of your lands enter tapped, slowing your tempo?
"Thank you! You're now on our email list."
Select the level that you are on
"You've already activated this theme, but it is not insalled"
Do you want to download it again?
This theme has been updated, do you want to download the update?
Fully customize the Mythic Tools life counter with images, colors and animations from your favorite content creators. Half of the profits go directly to them!
Always show the time on screen
Tap and hold the menu button to see the time left
"Transferring the ownership of this playgroup to {1} cannot be undone. You will remain an admin, but won't be able to remove other admins any more."
Thank you for participating! You got %1$d out of %2$d questions correct. Unfortunately, you have no attempts remaining.
Congratulations! You got all the questions correct!
"Congratulations! Head to the Command Zone judges' stand to collect your prize!"
You got %1$d out of %2$d questions correct. You have %3$d attempt(s) remaining.

"When turn timers are enabled, each player will have to tap on their life quadrant to end their current turn.
This adds one tracking step per turn but allows to time all the turns and know on which one the game ended.
You will get more relevant statistics this way."
What happens when I enable turn timers?
Turn Timers cannot be changed after the game started. Restart game first.
"Once you disable the turn timers, you won't be able to turn them back on since the game has already progressed."
Type in a new tag name or select an existing one
Failed to fully identify card. Adding card with cached data for now.
Unable to import new cards in Deck
This will send an unshare request for %1$s. Their cards will be separated from the shared collection, once they accept.
This will update all cards in the deck to their cheapest available printings. Are you sure?
Failed to update deck to cheapest printings.
Select languages to consider. Leave empty to consider all languages.
Note: Only cards that are not yet marked as owned in your collection will be updated.
Beyond the strength of an average precon deck.
WELCOME TO YOUR NEW FAVOURITE MULTIPLAYER LIFE COUNTER
"Just swipe over a life quadrant and go into the new ’Counters' section to enable them."
"Which player is receiving the city's blessing?"
Which player is receiving commander damage?
Which player is adjusting energy counters?
Which player is receiving experience counters?
Which player is taking the initiative?
Which player is becoming the monarch?
Which player is receiving poison counters?
Which player is receiving radiation counters?
Which player is adjusting storm count?
Which player is adjusting commander tax count?
Which player is tempted by the ring?
while supporting your favorite content creators
Setting the quantity to 0 will delete the card from this list.
Sorry, the Android camera encountered a problem. You may need to restart the device.
Place a barcode inside the viewfinder rectangle to scan it.
